attacking_style: Not an attacker; pure sprinter who relies on positioning and timing in final 200m. Excels in reduced bunch sprints but rarely initiates moves.
team_tactics: Often operates with minimal leadout support, forcing self-reliance on positioning discipline. When team tempo is set by others, struggles if pace extends too long before finale.
terrain_preference: Flat to slightly rolling finishes where peloton naturally fragments. Exposed on stages with sustained high tempo or climbs within 20-30km of finish that thin the bunch before sprint.
vulnerability: Extended high-tempo pace-making by strong teams drops him before sprint opportunities materialize. Lacks explosive power recovery after prolonged threshold efforts.
key_patterns: Achieves results through positioning consistency rather than pure top-end speed (Benelux green jersey)
Performs better in reduced sprints with minimal leadout than full field gallops
Dropped when pace is elevated well before finale, struggles with extended tempo shifts
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Giro second place shows improved sprint form and ability to finish despite leadout deficiencies, suggesting tactical maturation
